name: [TC-101] Create Supplier S1
steps:
1. Go to /supplier
2. Click 'Add Supplier' button (opens right drawer)
3. Fill fields:
   - Name: Karachi Fabrics Ltd
   - Phone: 0300-1111111
   - Address: Karachi, Pakistan
   - Notes: Primary fabric supplier. Credit terms: 30 days.
4. Click Save
expected_result:
- New row 'Karachi Fabrics Ltd' appears in supplier table
- Status badge: ACTIVE (green)
- Phone: 0300-1111111
- Balance: PKR 0.00
- /supplier/detail/[id]: all fields correct, all tabs empty
notes: RECORD S1 ID after creation — used in all later phases

name: [TC-102] Create Supplier S2
steps:
1. Go to /supplier → click 'Add Supplier'
2. Fill fields:
   - Name: Punjab Steel Works
   - Phone: 0311-2222222
   - Address: Lahore, Pakistan
   - Notes: Steel supplier. Cash payment preferred.
3. Click Save
expected_result:
- Both S1 and S2 appear in the list
- List shows 'Showing 2 of 2 records'
- Both have ACTIVE status, PKR 0.00 balance

name: [TC-103] Edit Supplier S1
steps:
1. Go to /supplier/detail/[S1_ID]
2. Click Edit button
3. Change Phone from 0300-1111111 to 0300-9999999
4. Change Notes to: Updated: Net 45 days credit.
5. Save
expected_result:
- Phone shows 0300-9999999 on detail page
- Notes updated
- Name and Address unchanged
- Balance still PKR 0.00

name: [TC-104] Supplier List Search & Filter
steps:
1. Go to /supplier
2. Type 'Punjab' in search box → verify only S2 shown
3. Clear search → verify both shown
4. Apply status filter = ACTIVE → both shown
5. Apply status filter = INACTIVE → none shown
expected_result:
- Search by name filters correctly
- Clear restores full list
- Status filter works
- No results state shown correctly when filter matches nothing

name: [TC-105] Supplier Status Toggle (Deactivate & Reactivate)
steps:
1. Go to /supplier/detail/[S2_ID]
2. Change status to INACTIVE
3. Verify badge = INACTIVE, balance/data unchanged
4. Go to /supplier → filter ACTIVE → only S1 shown
5. Filter INACTIVE → only S2 shown
6. Reactivate S2 → badge returns to ACTIVE
7. Filter ACTIVE → both S1 and S2 shown
expected_result:
- Status toggle works in both directions
- Data (balance, notes) preserved after status change
- List filters reflect status correctly
- End state: both suppliers ACTIVE
notes: Must reactivate S2 before proceeding to next phases

name: [TC-106] Supplier Form Validation
steps:
1. Go to /supplier → click 'Add Supplier'
2. Click Save without filling anything
3. Observe error messages
4. Try entering a duplicate phone number (0311-2222222) and saving
expected_result:
- Empty submit: Name required error shown, drawer stays open, no new supplier created
- Duplicate phone: either error shown or allowed (note behavior)
notes: Note whether duplicate phone is enforced by the backend or not

name: [TC-201] Create Customer C1
steps:
1. Go to /customer → click 'Add Customer'
2. Fill fields:
   - Name: Ahmed Traders
   - Phone: 0333-3333333
   - Address: Islamabad, Pakistan
   - Notes: Wholesale buyer. Credit limit PKR 500,000.
3. Save
expected_result:
- 'Ahmed Traders' appears in list with ACTIVE status, PKR 0.00
- /customer/detail/[id]: all fields correct, all tabs empty

name: [TC-202] Create Customer C2
steps:
1. Go to /customer → click 'Add Customer'
2. Fill fields:
   - Name: Zara Retail
   - Phone: 0344-4444444
   - Address: Karachi, Pakistan
   - Notes: Retail store. COD only.
3. Save
expected_result: - Both C1 and C2 in list, both ACTIVE, both PKR 0.00

name: [TC-203] Edit Customer C1
steps:
1. Go to /customer/detail/[C1_ID] → Edit
2. Change Address to: Blue Area, Islamabad
3. Save
expected_result:
- Address updated on detail page
- Balance unchanged at PKR 0.00
- Other fields unchanged

name: [TC-204] Customer List Search
steps:
1. Search 'Zara' → only C2 shown
2. Search 'traders' (lowercase) → only C1 shown (case-insensitive check)
3. Clear → both shown
expected_result:
- Search filters correctly
- Search is case-insensitive
- Clear restores full list

name: [TC-205] Customer Status Toggle
steps:
1. Deactivate C2 → verify INACTIVE badge
2. Filter list by INACTIVE → only C2 shown
3. Reactivate C2 → verify ACTIVE badge
4. Filter ACTIVE → both C1 and C2 shown
expected_result:
- Toggle works both directions
- Filter reflects status correctly
- End state: both customers ACTIVE
notes: Must reactivate C2 before later phases

name: [TC-301] Create Product P1 (Premium Cloth)
steps:
1. Go to /products → click 'Add Product'
2. Fill fields:
   - Name: Premium Cloth
   - SKU: CLT-001
   - Category: Fabric
   - Unit: Meter
3. Save
expected_result:
- 'Premium Cloth' in list, ACTIVE status, Unit: Meter, Stock: 0
- /products/detail/[id]: Stock = 0, Avg Cost = PKR 0.00, no variants, all tabs empty

name: [TC-302] Add Variants to P1
steps:
1. Go to /products/detail/[P1_ID]
2. Click 'Add Variant'
3. Variant 1: Size/Label = Small (S), SKU = CLT-001-S → Save
4. Add Variant again
5. Variant 2: Size/Label = Medium, SKU = CLT-001-M → Save
expected_result:
- 2 variant rows in variants table
- P1-V1: Size Small (S), SKU CLT-001-S, Stock 0, Status ACTIVE
- P1-V2: Size Medium, SKU CLT-001-M, Stock 0, Status ACTIVE
notes: RECORD P1-V1 ID and P1-V2 ID

name: [TC-303] Create Product P2 (Steel Rod) with Variants
steps:
1. Create product:
   - Name: Steel Rod, SKU: STL-001, Category: Hardware, Unit: Kg
2. Add Variant 1: Size = 6mm, SKU = STL-001-6
3. Add Variant 2: Size = 12mm, SKU = STL-001-12
expected_result: - P2 in list with 2 variants, all stock = 0
notes: RECORD P2 ID, P2-V1 ID, P2-V2 ID

name: [TC-304] Edit Product and Variant
steps:
1. Edit P1: change Category to 'Premium Fabric'
2. Edit P1-V1: change Size label to 'Small (S)'
3. Save each
expected_result:
- P1 Category updated
- P1-V1 label updated
- Stock and other variants unchanged

name: [TC-305] Deactivate and Reactivate Variant
steps:
1. Deactivate P1-V2 → badge = INACTIVE
2. Verify P1-V1 still ACTIVE
3. Verify product-level status still ACTIVE
4. Reactivate P1-V2 → badge = ACTIVE
expected_result:
- Variant status toggled independently from product
- End state: P1-V2 ACTIVE

name: [TC-306] Product Search & Status Filter
steps:
1. Search 'cloth' → only P1 shown
2. Search 'steel' → only P2 shown
3. Clear → both shown
4. Deactivate P2 → filter INACTIVE → P2 shown
5. Reactivate P2
expected_result:
- Search and status filter work correctly
- End state: both products ACTIVE

name: [TC-401] Create Payment Account A1 (HBL Main)
steps:
1. Go to /payment-accounts → click 'Add Account'
2. Fill fields:
   - Name: HBL Main
   - Type: BANK
   - Opening Balance: 100000
3. Save
expected_result:
- 'HBL Main' in list, Type: BANK, Balance: PKR 100,000.00
- Detail page: Opening Balance PKR 100,000, Current Balance PKR 100,000, Total In/Out PKR 0, Statement empty

name: [TC-402] Create Payment Account A2 (Cash Box)
steps:
1. Create account:
   - Name: Cash Box
   - Type: CASH
   - Opening Balance: 50000
expected_result: - Balance: PKR 50,000.00

name: [TC-403] Create Payment Account A3 (JazzCash)
steps:
1. Create account:
   - Name: JazzCash
   - Type: WALLET
   - Opening Balance: 20000
expected_result: - Balance: PKR 20,000.00

name: [TC-404] Dashboard Cash & Bank KPI After Opening Balances
steps:
1. Go to / (Dashboard)
2. Check the 'Cash & Bank' KPI card
3. Check the per-account breakdown
notes: This is the first dashboard check — establishes baseline

name: [TC-405] Edit Payment Account & Status Toggle
steps:
1. Edit A1: change Name to 'HBL Main Account' → Save
2. Verify name updated, balance unchanged
3. Deactivate A3: status = INACTIVE
4. Check dashboard Cash & Bank total (note if it changes)
5. Reactivate A3
6. Apply type filter on list: BANK → only A1, CASH → only A2, WALLET → only A3
expected_result:
- Name edit reflected everywhere
- Status toggle works
- Type filter shows correct accounts
- End state: all 3 accounts ACTIVE
notes: Note whether inactive accounts are excluded from Dashboard total
